title: [Request] Minimize tabs on connect
author: Silent-Joker
body_snippet: Can there be an option to minimize tabs on connect.  I have connection tabs on left and popup.  When i connect to a connection it sits on the connections and i must move my mouse away from the tab.

iterations.description: The issue title suggests minimizing tabs on connect but the body is empty and the only comment is a maintainer asking for clarification, indicating the request is unclear and no reporter response was provided.

comments.author: kmscode
comments.snippet:
To make sure that I understand: Connections tree is set to autohide, but even after opening a connection, the tree is still visible until you move your mouse away from it?

If I'm not understanding properly... Could you please clarify, possibly with screen shots?

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage: The issue title suggests minimizing tabs on connect but the body is empty and the only comment is a maintainer asking for clarification, indicating the request is unclear and no reporter response was provided.
Approach: Once clarified, likely add an option to auto-hide or minimize the connection tree/tabs panel when a connection is opened.
